_comment: Reference acoustic profiles. The trained model keys on these blade-pass regions; values mirror corvus-sentinel-project.md and training/corvus_synth.py.

skydio_x2.notes: periodic tonal comb + broadband below 500 Hz

dji_phantom_4.notes: higher fundamental than Skydio, clean harmonic series

potensic_atom_2.notes: measured from field capture (kpitts, 2026-06-29): low ~330 Hz blade-pass comb with a 2.3-2.7 kHz motor cluster. Sub-250 g micro; quieter than the others.
